⚖️ Responsible AI.title: Dave Eggers told OpenAI staff that ChatGPT was ‗silencing an entire generation’
⚖️ Responsible AI.summary: Author Dave Eggers expressed concern that ChatGPT is "silencing an entire generation," highlighting the need for responsible AI development.

hot_take: The recent release of various AI models highlights the need for responsible AI development and the importance of considering the potential impact of AI on society.
